chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 14 and 15 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.666/2024 2. For hearing of main case 07.11.2025 Mr. Atif Hafeez advocate holds brief for Syed Muhammad Abbas Haider, advocate for the applicant These reference applications are pending for almost two years without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Even today brief is being held on behalf of applicant’s counsel and adjournment sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with these matters. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
